# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that builds Docker images with user-provided image tags and registry URLs. Accept these as build parameters and use them directly in docker build and push commands. This allows teams to deploy to different registries without modifying the pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    options {
        skipStagesByDefault true
        // Commented out for now due to Docker image issue with jdk11 in Jenkinsfile
        // buildDiscarder(name: 'Custom Build Discarder', strategy: com.cloudbees.groovy.scm.CBSBuildDiscarder)
    }

    parameters {
        string(name: 'IMAGE_NAME', description: 'Docker image name')
        string(name: 'REGISTRY_URL', description: 'Registry URL for Docker images')
        string(name: 'DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG', description: 'Tag of the Docker image')
    }

    environment {
        DOCKER_REGISTRY = "https://${REGISTRY_URL}/v2/"
        DOCKER_USER_ID = env.DOCKER_USERNAME
        DOCKER_PASSWORD_ID = env.DOCKER_PASSWORD
        BUILD_NODE_LABELS = ''
    }

    stages {
        stage('Prepare build environment') {
            steps {
                sh 'echo "DOCKER_REGISTRY: ${DOCKER_REGISTRY}" >> .env'
                sh 'echo "BUILD_NODE_LABELS: ${BUILD_NODE_LABELS}" >> .env'
            }
        }
        stage('Build Docker image') {
            steps {
                withDockerRegistry([credentialsId: env.DOCKER_CREDENTIALS_ID, url: env.DOCKER_REGISTRY]) {
                    sh """
                        echo "${DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG}"
                        docker build -t ${IMAGE_NAME}:${DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG} .
                    """
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Push Docker image') {
            steps {
                withDockerRegistry([credentialsId: env.DOCKER_CREDENTIALS_ID, url: env.DOCKER_REGISTRY]) {
                    sh "docker push ${IMAGE_NAME}:${DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG}"
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            emailext body: 'Build passed', subject: 'Jenkins - Build Success',
            to: 'your_email@example.com'
        }
        failure {
            emailext body: 'Build failed with status ${currentBuild.result}', subject: 'Jenkins - Build Failure',
            to: 'your_email@example.com'
        }
    }

    options {
        skipDefaultCheckout true
        buildDiscarder(name: 'Custom Build Discarder', strategy: com.cloudbees.groovy.scm.CBSBuildDiscarder)
    }
}
